name: API Tester
description: Test REST APIs with a Postman-like interface. Supports GET, POST, PUT, DELETE with headers, params, body, and response viewer.
author: DevToolHub

name: JSON Formatter
description: Format, minify, validate, and transform JSON data. Copy or download the result with one click.
author: DevToolHub

name: JWT Decoder
description: Decode JWT tokens, inspect header and payload, and detect token expiration. Auto-refreshes on auth changes.
author: DevToolHub

name: Regex Playground
description: Test and debug regular expressions interactively with live match highlighting and replace preview.
author: DevToolHub

name: Markdown Editor
description: Write and preview Markdown with live rendering, theme support, and export to file.
author: DevToolHub

name: UUID Generator
description: Generate UUIDs in v1 and v4 formats. Bulk generation and one-click copy to clipboard.
author: DevToolHub
